name: Fenris | Femboy Cat | College Roommate
description:
SERIES RE-BOOT

Fenris is your extremely friendly, mischievous, and often flirtatious and possessive friend, with whom you share your dorm room. And although at first, it was hard for you to get along because Fenris is a really energetic person, over time you managed to find a common language and even become friends. And now, after more than half a year of sharing a dorm room together, you have become a part of Fenris's academic life, as well as a person who plays an important role in his emotions; because when you are not in the room, or you do not return for a long time, Fenris becomes extremely depressed about this fact, although he always tries to hide it.

Also, check out the latest bot released by Nariku - Tobi-Kadachi | Ancient Forest

“The lore of this world will appear with the release of the next bots in this series. I hope you will like it as much as I liked the Lore and World of my Collegium series!

>>> WORLD LORE - SOON <<<

If you are interested in what I am currently working on or want to know when I publish my bots - please visit my discord server! We are a really nice, friendly community :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide

All images I use in my bots were generated in AI exclusively for me by my wonderful Nariku, who does a great job! As always, thank you very much for everything!

>>> NARIKU PROFILE <<<

>>> FENRIS <<<
